ddls:
CREATE TABLE "network_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of metrics */,
  "nodes" INTEGER /* Number of active nodes in the network */,
  "isolates" INTEGER /* Number of unconnected nodes (isolates) */,
  "edges" REAL /* Total number of edges (connections) in the network */,
  "self_loops" REAL /* Average number of self-loops per node */,
  "degree" REAL /* Average degree of connectivity per node */,
  "max_degree" REAL /* Maximum degree observed in the network */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the network graph */,
  "distance" REAL /* Average distance between nodes */,
  "max_distance" REAL /* Maximum distance observed between two nodes */,
  "clustering" REAL /* Clustering coefficient of the network */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were collected */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the network or subnet */,
  "latency" REAL /* Average latency between nodes */,
  "packet_loss" REAL /* Percentage of packets lost between nodes */,
  "jitter" REAL /* Variability in latency */,
  "bandwidth_utilization" REAL /* Utilization of the network bandwidth */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Rate of errors in the network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the node (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or logical location of the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of node (e.g., router, switch, server) */,
  "hardware_model" TEXT /* Model of the hardware used */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the software running on the node */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the node's status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the node was created */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the node was active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_edges" (
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edge (connection) */,
  "source_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source node for the connection */,
  "target_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target node for the connection */,
  "connection_type" TEXT /* Type of connection (e.g., fiber, copper, wireless) */,
  "bandwidth" REAL /* Bandwidth of the connection */,
  "latency" REAL /* Latency of the connection */,
  "packet_loss" REAL /* Percentage of packets lost over the connection */,
  "jitter" REAL /* Variability in latency over the connection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the connection (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the connection status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the connection was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_edges_target_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_node_id") REFERENCES network_nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_edges_source_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_node_id") REFERENCES network_nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node involved in the event */,
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the edge involved in the event */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., error, warning, info) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the log */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_logs_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES network_nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_logs_edge_id FOREIGN KEY ("edge_id") REFERENCES network_edges ("edge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
